compiled_state.title: plan-review skill dispatches as agent type 'dso:plan-review' but no agent definition exists — only a skill SKILL.md

compiled_state.description: Observed in host project: plan-review is invoked as a sub-agent type 'dso:plan-review' but it is a skill (plugins/dso/skills/plan-review/SKILL.md), not an agent (no plugins/dso/agents/plan-review.md). Error: Agent type 'dso:plan-review' not found.
